---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem or use case**
What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that
Agent86 doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What would you like to see added or changed?

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried or alternative approaches.

**Adapter / component affected**
- [ ] ts-adapter
- [ ] py-adapter
- [ ] js-adapter
- [ ] mcp-server
- [ ] conformance
- [ ] ab-harness
- [ ] spec (see CONTRIBUTING.md for spec proposal process)
